title: HyperDirector Storyboard
description: Scene-by-scene video structure. The structural contract between storyboard and index.html. Duration sum must equal brief.duration_seconds.

title.description: Video project title. Should match brief.title.

total_duration.description: Sum of all scene durations. Must equal brief.duration_seconds (±0.5s tolerance).

aspect_ratio.description: Canvas aspect ratio. Must match brief.aspect_ratio.

template.description: Template used for this storyboard. Must match brief.template.

scenes.description: Ordered list of scenes. Order matches timeline position.

id.description: Unique scene identifier. Format: scene_01, scene_02, ... Used as HTML element ID prefix.

duration.description: Scene duration in seconds. Must match data-duration on the scene's root HTML element.

purpose.description: Narrative role of this scene. Drives pacing and visual intensity decisions.

headline.description: Main on-screen headline text. Should be punchy and readable. Language follows brief.language.

visual.description: Visual description for the composer. Describes layout, elements, animation intent. Plain text, no code.

caption.description: Subtitle/caption text for this scene. Displayed in the subtitle safe zone. Language follows brief.language.

transition.description: Entrance transition for this scene. Maps to a GSAP ease pattern in the composer.

brand_accent.description: If true, apply brand accent color prominently in this scene (e.g., for hook and CTA scenes).

assets.description: Optional list of asset references needed for this scene.

path.description: Relative path from output project root. Example: assets/screenshot-01.png

alt.description: Description of the asset for accessibility and agent context.

notes.description: Director notes for the composer. Clarifications, special effects, or implementation hints not captured in other fields. Plain text only.
